title: Programmer Art PBR
description: Experience the Nostalgia of the game with PBR materials!
body:
Video Showcase:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/y7lkyIVtxGE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Just as reminder, this project is not fully done and there might be missing textures.
make sure to use the default Programmer Art below this pack or AVPBR Retextured

What is Programmer Art PBR?

It's a project that I've worked on since 2024 and is meant to give the old nostalgic textures of the game a brand new look with the use of labPBR textures.
the style follows the same principle as AVPBR Retextured with additions of soft AO around edges.




## Recommended Shader Settings

<details>
  <summary>Nostalgia/Kappa</summary>
  
- Lighting 
  - Direct Lighting
    - Subsurface Scatter: `LabPBR Only`
  - Indirect Lighting
    - Texture AO: `ON`
    - Emission Mode: `Hardcoded + Lab`
    - SSPT: `ON(Optional)`
    - labPBR Emission Exponent: `2.0`
- Terrain
  - Vertex Attribute Fix: `OFF`
  - Parallax Occlusion Mapping
    - Enabled: `ON`
    - POM Samples: `64+(Recommended)`
    - Self Shadow Samples: `32+(Recommended)`
    - Slope Normal Calculation: `ON(Recommended)`
  - Reflections
    - Resource Pack Reflections: `ON`
</details>
<details>
  <summary>SEUS PTGI HRR</summary>
  
- Texture Resolution: `128`
- Raytracing
  - Full Raytrace Reflections: `ON`
  - Screen-Space Reflection Tracing: `ON`
  - Screen-Space GI Tracing: `ON`
  - Glowing Emerald Block: `OFF`
  - Glowing Lapis Lazuli Block: `OFF`
- Surface
  - Parallax Occlusion Mapping: `ON`
  - Smooth Parallax Surface: `OFF`
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Complementary Reimagined</summary>
  
- RP Support: `LabPBR`
- Materials
  - SEUSPBR / LabPBR
    - POM Depth: `1.00`
</details>

## Terms Of Usage

1. You may use and modify this pack to your liking as long as you follow rule 4.
1. You may make content with this resource pack and credit me by using at least one of these links:  
    - `https://joaquixlab.com/project/programmer-art-pbr`
    - `https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/programmer-art-pbr`
    - `https://www.patreon.com/joaquix1021`
1. You may not credit the pack in your name.
1. You may not redistribute the pack or its textures without permission.
